title: The J.M. Smucker's (SJM) Core Priorities Aid, SD&A Costs Hurt

title: J.M. Smucker is too sweet to pass up down here
text: The J.M. Smucker Co. NYSE: SJM is a leading consumer packaged goods company with a family of trusted brands you may not know. It's a member of the consumer staples sector along with its competitors like General Mills Inc. NYSE: GIS and Conagra Brands Inc. NYSE: CAG.

title: J.M. Smucker: Looking A Lot Better Already
text: Smucker's acquisition of Hostess Brands raised concerns about leverage and growth potential. Recent developments, including a solid performance and lower interest rates, have made the company's shares look healthier. The acquisition of Hostess Brands was expensive and added leverage, but current stock levels present a more appealing opportunity for investment.

title: Midday Movers: Albemarle Falls After Downgrade, J.M. Smucker Rises on Profit Forecast
text: U.S. equities were mixed and little changed at midday after government data showed the number of job openings fell more than expected in October. The Dow and S&P 500 were lower, while the Nasdaq was up.

title: The J.M. Smucker (SJM) Q2 Earnings Top Estimates, Pricing Aids

title: Compared to Estimates, Smucker (SJM) Q2 Earnings: A Look at Key Metrics

title: The J.M. Smucker Co. (SJM) Q2 2024 Earnings Call Transcript
text: The J.M. Smucker Co. (NYSE:SJM ) Q2 2024 Earnings Conference Call December 5, 2023 9:00 AM ET Company Participants Aaron Broholm - Vice President of Investor Relations Tucker Marshall - Chief Financial Officer Mark Smucker - Chair of the Board, President & Chief Executive Officer Conference Call Participants Andrew Lazar - Barclays Ken Goldman - JP Morgan Robert Moskow - TD Cowen Peter Galbo - Bank of America Matt Smith - Stifel Jason English - Goldman Sachs Rob Dickerson - Jefferies Operator Good morning and welcome to The J.M. Smucker Company's Fiscal 2024 Second Quarter Earnings question-and-answer session.

title: JM Smucker sales boosted by 'Uncrustables' demand
text: JM Smucker Co reported an increase in underlying second quarter sales boosted by higher prices.  The maker of Jif peanut butter said total sales in the quarter ended October 31 decreased 12% to $266.5 million reflecting disposals last year, while comparable sales rose 7%.

title: Folgers parent J.M. Smucker beats profit estimates but sales fall slightly short and company lowers guidance
text: J.M. Smucker Co.'s stock SJM, +0.91% rose about 1% in premarket trade Tuesday, after the parent of Folgers coffee and Jif peanut butter beat profit estimates for the third quarter, while sales fell slightly short and it lowered its full-year guidance. Orrville, Ohio-based Smucker had net income of $194.9 million, or $1.91 a share, for the quarter, up from $191.1 million, or $1.79 a share, in the year-earlier period.

title: 2 Consumer packaged goods companies to start your morning right

title: The J.M. Smucker Co. Announces Fiscal 2024 Second Quarter Results
text: ORRVILLE, Ohio , Dec. 5, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- The J.M. Smucker Co. (NYSE: SJM) today announced results for the second quarter ended October 31, 2023, of its 2024 fiscal year.
